---
name: Bug report
about: Something is not working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Enter text '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the UI or the browser console.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| **OS** | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14 |
| **Browser** | e.g. Chrome 123, Firefox 125 |
| **Python version** | e.g. 3.11 |
| **Node version** | e.g. 20.x |

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (e.g. does it happen with specific text, a specific language, a specific analysis type?).
